zh.Witton Risby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾利斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh FitzPincheon於1100年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Pinco FitzPincheon41歲，母親FitzPincheon21歲。他於1146年與FitzPincheon在英國英格蘭素福爾可威克姆 斯凱斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1167年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh FitzPincheon于1100年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Pinco FitzPincheon41岁，母亲FitzPincheon21岁。他于1146年与FitzPincheon在英国英格兰素福爾可威克姆 斯凱斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1167年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh FitzPincheon was born in 1100, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Pinco FitzPincheon, was 41 and his mother, FitzPincheon, was 21. He married FitzPincheon in 1146, in Wickham Skeith, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1167, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh FitzPincheon est né en 1100, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Pinco FitzPincheon, avait 41 ans et sa mère, FitzPincheon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé FitzPincheon en 1146, à Wickham Skeith, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1167, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

Er starb 1167 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato FitzPincheon nel 1146, nel Wickham Skeith, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzPincheonが1100年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Pinco FitzPincheonは41歳，母FitzPincheonは21歳であった。1146年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハム スケイスでFitzPincheonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1167年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzPincheon(이)가 1100년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pinco FitzPincheon(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 FitzPincheon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함 스케이스에서 FitzPincheon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh FitzPincheon nasceu em 1100, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Pinco FitzPincheon, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, FitzPincheon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com FitzPincheon em 1146, em Wickham Skeith, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh FitzPincheon родился в 1100 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Pinco FitzPincheon было 41 год, а матери, которую звали FitzPincheon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени FitzPincheon в 1146 г. в местности виккхам скит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1167 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
